name: /stop for a user without a subscription

payload.text: You don't have an active subscription. Tap /start to set one up.

Your daily digest is now paused. You won't receive any more summaries until you restart with /start.

Your preferences have been saved — tap /start anytime to resume.

name: /stop when already unsubscribed shows paused message

payload.text: Your digest is already paused. Tap /start to resume.

Your daily digest is now paused. You won't receive any more summaries until you restart with /start.

Your preferences have been saved — tap /start anytime to resume.

name: unsubscribe callback from digest stops immediately

payload.text:
